## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format`, `dart analyze`, and `dart test` pass for any changed Dart package
- [ ] `flutter analyze` and `flutter test` pass if the app changed
- [ ] LiteLLM router tests pass if `integrations/litellm/` changed
- [ ] Dependency changes, if any, were recreated on this first-party branch; no Dependabot commit is included
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under "Unreleased" if behavior changed
- [ ] No tokens, model/inference calls, or emoji introduced
